2606.19932.title: Spatial-Aware Reduction Framework: Towards Efficient and Faithful Visual State Space Models
2606.19932.paper_summary: Mamba demonstrates strong efficiency in modeling long visual sequences. However, when token reduction is applied to structurally enhanced Mamba variants, these models exhibit a severe performance collapse. We attribute this degradation to the spatially agnostic nature of existing reduction methods, which violate the two-dimensional structural premise required by the selective scanning mechanism. In this work, we propose STORM, a spatial-aware token reduction framework designed to maintain structural integrity throughout the compression process. STORM reformulates reduction into a structured operation on spatial units, enforcing localized constraints to maintain both grid topology and neighborhood coherence. As a plug-and-play module, STORM equips existing reduction pipelines with explicit spatial awareness without any training. Empirical results demonstrate that STORM achieves state-of-the-art pruning accuracy across diverse vision Mamba backbones under training-free settings. Notably, STORM delivers a substantial accuracy recovery on VMamba, outperforming prior methods by up to 63.3\% in top-1 accuracy. Meanwhile, STORM incurs only a 1.0\% accuracy drop on PlainMamba, achieving performance comparable to ViT.
2606.19932.paper_summary_zh: Mamba 在建模長視覺序列方面展現出強大的效率。<lb/>然而，當對結構增強的 Mamba 變體應用標記減少時，這些模型會出現嚴重的性能崩潰。<lb/>我們將這一退化歸因於現有減少方法的空間無關性質，這違反了選擇性掃描機制所需的二維結構前提。<lb/>在這項工作中，我們提出了 STORM，一個空間感知的標記減少框架，旨在在壓縮過程中保持結構完整性。<lb/>STORM 將減少重新定義為對空間單元的結構化操作，強制執行局部約束以保持網格拓撲和鄰域一致性。<lb/>作為一個即插即用的模塊，STORM 為現有的減少管道提供了明確的空間感知，而無需任何訓練。<lb/>實證結果表明，STORM 在無需訓練的設置下，在多樣的視覺 Mamba 骨幹上實現了最先進的修剪準確性。<lb/>值得注意的是，STORM 在 VMamba 上實現了顯著的準確性恢復，並在 top-1 準確性上超越了先前的方法，提升幅度高達 63.3\%。<lb/>同時，STORM 在 PlainMamba 上僅造成 1.0\% 的準確性下降，實現了與 ViT 相當的性能。
2606.19932.author: Jindi Lv et.al.
2606.19932.authors: Jindi Lv, Aoyu Li, Yuhao Zhou, Zheng Zhu, Xiaofeng Wang, Qing Ye, Yueqi Duan, Wentao Feng, Jiancheng Lv
